allow: Bash(sed -i "s|  function publish\(\) {|  async function publish\(\) {|" sansagents_formulaire_v16.html)

Bash(sed -i "s|    const listing = SA.addListing\(collectFormData\(\)\);|    const btn = document.getElementById\('btnPublish'\); btn.disabled = true;\\n    let listing;\\n    try { listing = await SA.addListing\(collectFormData\(\)\); } catch\(e\) { SA.toast\('Erreur lors de la publication : ' + e.message, 'ti-alert-circle'\); btn.disabled = false; return; }|" sansagents_formulaire_v16.html)
Bash(sed -i "s|  function publish\(\) {|  async function publish\(\) {|" sansagents_inscription_pro.html)

Bash(sed -i "s|    const pro = SA.addPro\(collectFormData\(\)\);|    const btn = document.querySelector\('.btn-publish'\);\\n    if \(btn\) btn.disabled = true;\\n    let pro;\\n    try { pro = await SA.addPro\(collectFormData\(\)\); } catch\(e\) { SA.toast\(e.message === 'siret-invalid' ? 'Le SIRET doit contenir exactement 14 chiffres.' : 'Erreur : ' + e.message, 'ti-alert-circle'\); if \(btn\) btn.disabled = false; return; }|" sansagents_inscription_pro.html)
Bash(sed -i "s|  document.addEventListener\('DOMContentLoaded', fillJobSelect\);\\n  fillJobSelect\(\);|  SA.init\(\).then\(function\(\) { fillJobSelect\(\); }\);|" sansagents_inscription_pro.html)
Bash(sed -i 's/  const nowFav = SA.toggleFavorite\(listingId\);/  const nowFav = await SA.toggleFavorite\(listingId\);/' sansagents_annonce_detail.html)
Bash(sed -i 's/  const result = SA.sendMessage\(id, text\);/  const result = await SA.sendMessage\(id, text\);/' sansagents_annonce_detail.html)
Bash(sed -i 's/^function markSold\(id, transaction\) {$/async function markSold\(id, transaction\) {/' sansagents_mes_annonces.html)
